docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-21-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-21-2026 BY JUDGE STEPHEN MURPHY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ALON CHANUKOV IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SHAINA CHANUKOV IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT VERNA TAM IS PRESENT AND REPRESENTED BY STEPHEN TAM. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,480.00 FILED BY TAM, VERNA (LANDLORD) AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CHANUKOV, ALON CHANUKOV, SHAINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-21-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY CHANUKOV, ALON CHANUKOV, SHAINA AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, VERNA (LANDLORD) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-21-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED JAN-07-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $269.36 AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CHANUKOV, ALON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-21-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-21-2026 BY JUDGE STEPHEN MURPHY. APPEARANCES: CROSS-COMPLAINANT VERNA TAM IS PRESENT AND REPRESENTED BY STEPHEN TAM. CROSS-DEFENDANT ALON CHANUKOV IS PRESENT AND CROSS-DEFENDANT SHAINA CHANUKOV IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. CROSS- COMPLAINANT AND CROSS-DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHANUKOV, ALON CHANUKOV, SHAINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAM, VERNA (LANDLORD) $4,960.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,035.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2026 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TAM, VERNA (LANDLORD) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CHANUKOV, ALON CHANUKOV, SHAINA DAMAGES ARE $2,480.00 FOR WRONGFUL FAILURE TO RETURN SECURITY DEPOSIT AND $2,480.00 FOR BAD FAITH WITHHOLDING OF SECURITY DEPOSIT UNDER CIVIL CODE 1950.5(1). ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT, VERNA TAM DID NOT OWN THE SUBJECT VEHICLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED JAN-07-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $186.56 AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CHANUKOV, SHAINA
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR STEPHEN TAM FILED BY DEFENDANT TAM, VERNA (LANDLORD)
